name: codex-session-logging
description: Capture and backfill Codex sessions into user-owned Supabase session history.

interface.shortDescription: Capture prompt and assistant message history.
interface.longDescription: Codex Session Logging captures live hook payloads and resumably backfills historical e3-solutions transcripts into a private Supabase Storage bucket with Postgres index and rollout-status rows.
defaultPrompt: Drain queued Codex session logs to Supabase
